content.text:
[Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]

CHG-0843: Close TRIGGER-03 and validate OC2A commissioning as live PROD HIVE lead node.

You are Forge (infra). Execute only. Do not plan or ask clarifying questions.

Required outputs:
1. Read state/chg-triggers.json. For TRIGGER-03, set status "fired" with firedAt ISO-8601 timestamp (AEST), validatedBy "forge/infra", add a brief closureNote referencing CHG-0843 and OC2A hardware validation. Because the second OC2 node/HA pair is not yet commissioned, set TRIGGER-01 and TRIGGER-02 status to "not_applicable" with a note explaining OC2A is live as single-node PROD pending future HA. Preserve all other triggers and fields exactly.
2. Run a Gemma4:26b health/benchmark on OC2A using the canonical local Ollama model path `ollama/gemma4:26b` (or the equivalent local model tag if present — check `ollama list`). Produce a short JSON artifact at state/chg0843-gemma4-26b-oc2a-benchmark.json with: timestamp, model tag, tokens_per_second (approx), load_latency_ms, status (ok/degraded/fail), and any errors. If the model is not pulled, attempt `ollama pull gemma4:26b` only if Ollama is running locally; otherwise record "model not available" in status.
3. Read MEMORY.md and TOOLS.md. If OC1 is still described as live PROD or OC2A as incoming/dev, swap the roles so OC2A = LIVE Production HIVE lead, OC1 = Dev/test environment. Do not change anything else. If already correct, leave a note in the artifact.
4. Create a single summary artifact at state/chg0843-execute-report.json with: changedFiles[], benchmarkPath, memoryToolsCorrected (true/false/na), and any blockers.

All changes must be validated by tests or inspection commands (e.g. jq/cat) before finishing. Do not edit AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, or any governance prompts. Report only the final JSON summary in your completion message.

Begin. Execute the assigned task to completion.
